hypothesis.thesis_statement: JoinQuant strategy G5_A2 (pure market_cap.asc on 中小综, top 12, weekly) — its raw size-sort alpha (without calendar blackout or stoploss overlays) is deployable out-of-sample on the local engine with stitched OOS Sharpe >= 1.0 on the 2024-2026 sealed holdout.
hypothesis.mechanism: Size premium in A-share microcap (Liu, Stambaugh & Yuan 2019, JFE — 'Size and value in China'). Dominated historically by 壳价值 (shell value of being publicly listed). Post 国九条 enforcement (2024-04-12), shell premium is empirically decaying. This hypothesis tests whether the residual size premium (after stripping shell value) is still tradable on the local engine's small_cap theme universe.

source.title: G5 韶华纯净小市值 (冷饭热吃之三) — JoinQuant in-sample backtest

pre_registered_concerns.most_likely_failure_mode: OOS Sharpe drops below 1.0 due to (a) 2014-2015 microcap windfall absence from sealed OOS — the JoinQuant +234,625% was dominated by this one regime; (b) realistic 10bps slippage drag costs ~16% annual at 11.6x turnover; (c) shell-value decay post 国九条 enforcement reducing the structural size premium (Liu, Stambaugh & Yuan 2019, JFE).
pre_registered_concerns.weakest_assumption: The mapping from JoinQuant 中小综 (399101, frozen 2021-04 after 深市主板 merger, ~800 names) to local engine small_cap theme sc_u4 (all_market + market_cap 10亿-100亿 + mainboard + ST-excluded + listing >= 375d + liquidity floor 20M RMB) is approximate. sc_u4 likely includes more 主板小盘 names that 中小综 did not, and excludes some legacy 中小板 names. min_listing_days=375 exactly matches G5_A2's filter_new_stock(375), so the listing-age filter is identical. A 'failure' here might reflect universe mismatch, not strategy failure — consider sc_u5 (cap up to 200亿) as a sensitivity test.
pre_registered_concerns.what_would_falsify_this: Stitched OOS Sharpe < 1.0 OR max_drawdown > -55% OR any single IS test fold underperforms benchmark by > -10% AND no fold delivers > +20% excess. Any of these falsifies 'the size sort delivers deployable alpha out of sample.'
pre_registered_concerns.priors_on_cost_sensitivity: G5_A2 turnover is ~11.6x/year per JoinQuant. At 10bps slippage + 0.1% stamp tax on sells, cost drag is ~30bps/rebalance x 52 rebalances ~= 16% annual gross drag. Cost-adjusted Sharpe should be ~60-70% of gross Sharpe. If cost-adjusted Sharpe is < 0.7, the strategy is not deployable even if gross Sharpe looks healthy.
